subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm and steadfast in the Covenant of God and His Testament! The two letters that were sent have been read [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الثابت الراسخ علی عهد الله و میثاقه قد قرئت الکتابین المرسلین و هما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @firmness in the Covenant, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
